title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0116 144 Whitehall Road, Bristol, BS5 9BP
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Application  Applicant name:  Duncan Blackmore  Site address:  144 Whitehall Road, Bristol, BS5 9BP  Description of proposed development:  Change of use of betting shop (Sui Generis), and external alterations to create 1no. residential flat (use class C3)  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 13 August 2025   Date by when representations must be made 16 September 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target Decision 8 October 2025   Decision date 7 October 2025     Decision    S62A/2025/0116 Decision Notice and Statement of Reasons  (PDF, 147 KB, 6 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 16 September 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, 3rd Floor, Temple Quay House, 2 The Square, Temple Quay, Bristol, BS1 6PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0116 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     Proposed Elevations A3  (PDF, 315 KB, 1 page)  Location Plan A3  (PDF, 162 KB, 1 page)  Inspectorate Planning Statement - 144 Whitehall Road, Bristol GF Only  (PDF, 4.4 MB, 21 pages)  Existing Roof Plan A3  (PDF, 245 KB, 1 page)  Existing Floorplans A3  (PDF, 271 KB, 1 page)  Existing Elevations A3  (PDF, 301 KB, 1 page)  Energy Statement  (PDF, 489 KB, 20 pages)  CIL Form  (PDF, 133 KB, 6 pages)  Application Form  (PDF, 2.06 MB, 14 pages)  Proposed Street Scene A3  (PDF, 293 KB, 1 page)  Proposed Site Plan and Refuse and Cycle Store Details A3  (PDF, 311 KB, 1 page)  Proposed Roof Plan A3  (PDF, 252 KB, 1 page)  Proposed Floorplans A3  (PDF, 285 KB, 1 page)   Questionnaire and...
